column3: Warren County Sheriff's Office (sales via RealAuction)
column9: Free state RealAuction portal. Alternating Tuesdays 8:30am; open 7+ days before sale. Bidding needs account + deposit.
Tax-delinquent foreclosures filed by Prosecutor, end up on Sheriff sale list.
Delinquent Tax List published as downloadable PDF. Easiest A-tier pull in the county.

column4: Mason: 6000 Mason-Montgomery Rd; Springboro: 320 W Central Ave
column9: No public online violations database. Written records request per city; slow & fragmented.

column3: City building depts; Warren Co. Building & Zoning (townships)
column9: No standalone published register. Lives in building-dept case files; request per jurisdiction.
Free 'AVA' search by name/address/parcel/doc-type. No native bulk export.

column3: Recorder (tax liens) + Clerk of Courts (judgment liens)
column4: Recorder 406 Justice Dr; Clerk 500 Justice Dr
column9: Tax liens in Recorder AVA; judgment liens in Clerk Common Pleas case inquiry (since 1991).

column3: Greater Cincinnati Water Works (Mason); city utilities elsewhere
column9: Shut-off lists not published; treated as confidential. Lowest-yield source.

column3: Warren Co. Building & Zoning (townships + Lebanon); cities run own
column9: Free permit search portal. 'Open/expired' filtering not native; targeted queries or data request.

column3: Lebanon Municipal Court + Warren County Court
column4: Lebanon Muni 50 S Broadway; County Court 822 Memorial Dr
column9: Pull FED cases, aggregate by plaintiff. NOTE: 'Warren Municipal Court' in Warren OH 44483 is Trumbull County - wrong.
ORC 5162.21 liens filed with Recorder. Cross-references with probate.
